Shows a green face when a slime chunk is detected.
§4Single Player Only!

1) Click a preset.
2) Change the color.
3) Click this button to update it.

screen.customization.title: Customize Sections
screen.customization.vanilla.crosshair.l: Crosshair color will change when the player's health is less or equal than 10.
screen.enhanced_patterns.title: Enhanced Patterns
screen.entity.equipment.tooltip: Hold down %s while pointing at any entity to show §6Equipment HUD§r.
screen.entity.equipment_players.tooltip: Hold down %s while pointing at any other player to open their §6Equipment Stats§f.
screen.entity.health_plate.tooltip: Shows the entity health on a plate (background), like the custom name.
screen.entity.main_hud.name: Entity Name
screen.entity.title: Pointed Entity Info
screen.equipment.bundle.tooltip: Hold %s while holding a §6Bundle§f to view its contents.
screen.equipment.food_stats.tooltip: Displays a pop-up message showing the stats of the selected food.
screen.equipment.item_stock.tooltip: Shows the total number of items in the inventory (main hand included).
screen.equipment.player_stats.tooltip: Hold %s while pointing to the air to show the §6Player Advanced Stats§f.
screen.equipment.quiver.tooltip: Shows the total number of arrows in the inventory.
screen.equipment.shulker.tooltip: Hold %s while holding a §6Shulker Box§f to view its contents.
screen.equipment.title: Player Equipment
screen.loaded_entities.title: Loaded Entities
screen.main_menu.messages.0: Did you know you can customize the 'Crosshair' appearance? Check it out!
screen.main_menu.messages.1: Did you know you can change the 'Block Outline' color? Check it out!
screen.main_menu.messages.2: Try the 'Advanced Damageables Better Tooltip' and give me some feedback!
screen.main_menu.messages.3: Visit the EssentialGUI's Reddit page for issues and suggestions!
screen.main_menu.messages.4: Do you like EssentialGUI? Buy me a coffee! §c❤
screen.main_menu.messages.5: Have you already tried the 'Night Vision' hack? It is very useful!
screen.main_menu.messages.6: Too many tree leaf particles? Change it now!
screen.main_menu.messages.7: Configure the sections' position and style in the 'HUD Position Screen'. Press <Ctrl + F12> while in-game.
screen.main_menu.messages.8: Click here to configure the visual aspects of the sections.
screen.main_menu.messages.9: Need a visual indicator when the crops are mature? Click here!
screen.main_menu.messages.10: While in-game, press <F7> to toggle the 'Block Light Overlay'.
screen.main_menu.messages.11: Want to see the entity health like the custom name? Enable the 'Health Plate' option!
screen.main_menu.title: Main Menu
screen.messages.restart: §cRestart Minecraft for changes to take effect!
screen.misc_features.crops_ready.tooltip: When the crops are ready to harvest, an item will hover above them.
screen.misc_features.furnace_stats.toolt: Adds a side panel at the §6Furnace Screen§f showing cooking and fuel stats.
screen.misc_features.gamma.tooltip: While ingame press %s or %s to increase/decrease the §6Gamma Level§f.
screen.misc_features.loaded_entities.too: While ingame press %s to open the §6Loaded Entities Screen§r.
screen.misc_features.night_vision.toolti: While ingame press %s to toggle the §6Night Vision§r feature.
screen.misc_features.smooth_lighting.too: While ingame press %s to toggle the §6Smooth Lighting§r.
screen.misc_features.title: Miscellaneous Features
screen.misc_features.zoom.tooltip: While ingame hold down %s to activate the §6Zoom§r feature.
screen.on_screen_equipment.title: Player On-Screen Equipment
screen.toggle_section_tooltip:
§aON §8→ §rEnables element rendering
§cOFF §8→ §rDisables both vanilla and EssentialGUI.
screen.tooltips.books.tooltip: Shows Writable and Written Books info.
screen.tooltips.discs.tooltip:
Shows Music Discs info.
§cOnly applicable to vanilla records.
screen.tooltips.fuel_stats.tooltip:
Shows the item burning stats.
§cOnly visible in the Furnace Screen.
screen.tooltips.maps.tooltip: Shows Filled Maps info and Buried Treasure coordinates.
screen.tooltips.damageables.better_toolt: An attempt to improve the default tooltip style. Only applicable to weapons, tools and armor. §cHighly experimental!
screen.tooltips.damageables.comparison.t: When hovering over armor or tools, it will show information about the equipped counterpart. Hold §6Left Shift §fto show the §6Comparison Tooltip§7.
screen.tooltips.damageables.durability_c: If enabled, the durability text will be colored based on the durability bar.
screen.tooltips.damageables.durability_a: Always show the item durability even if it is undamaged.
screen.tooltips.damageables.penalty.tool: Shows the item anvil uses count.
screen.tooltips.title: Advanced Item Tooltips
screen.vanilla.block_outline.tooltip:
Toggle the §6Block Outline§r custom appearance.
§cMay not work well with some shaders!
screen.vanilla.crosshair.tooltip:
Toggle the §6Crosshair§r custom appearance.
§cMay not work well with non-vanilla textures!
screen.vanilla.improved_held_item_toolti: Enhance and stylize the §6Held Item Tooltip§f.
Enhance and stylize the §6Overlay Message Background§f.
screen.vanilla.map_handling.enhanced.too: Improved the vanilla mechanic. Hold §6<RMB>§r to inspect the map with both hands.
screen.vanilla.map_handling.crosshair.to: Toggles the player’s crosshair when holding the map with both hands.
Toggles the health of the entity you are riding when in creative.
screen.vanilla.sign_text_outline.tooltip:
Toggles the sign text outline when it is glowing.
§aDisabling this may improve the performance on some systems§r.
screen.vanilla.title: Vanilla HUD Changes
screen.warning.awake_days.tooltip: Shows how many days the player has gone without sleep. Starting from the third day, Phantoms will appear.
screen.warning.saturation.tooltip: Shows a green + below the hunger bar when the player's saturation is high.
screen.warning.title: Player Warning Area
